interpretation: With the default HNSW config on 500 points (small index), ANN usually matches exact kNN closely. Scores near 1.0 are expected. The helper ran end-to-end without errors.
sample_question_texts: Which NFL team represented the AFC at Super Bowl 50?
Which NFL team represented the NFC at Super Bowl 50?
Where did Super Bowl 50 take place?
Which NFL team won Super Bowl 50?
What color was used to emphasize the 50th anniversary of the Super Bowl?
